ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly detection employed (e.g., global, local) */,
  "noise_type" TEXT /* Type of noise added to the dataset */,
  "labeled_anomaly_ratio" REAL /* Proportion of labeled anomalies in the dataset */,
  "noise_ratio" REAL /* Proportion of noise in the dataset */,
  "scaler_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scaling method used */,
  "rebalance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rebalancing method used */,
  "reduction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dimensionality reduction technique used */,
  "fill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the missing data handling method used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_scaler_id FOREIGN KEY ("scaler_id") REFERENCES scalers ("scaler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_rebalance_id FOREIGN KEY ("rebalance_id") REFERENCES rebalancing_methods ("rebalance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_reduction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reduction_id") REFERENCES dimensionality_reduction_techniques ("reduction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_fill_id FOREIGN KEY ("fill_id") REFERENCES missing_data_handling ("fill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset and its contents */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset (number of samples) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scalers" (
  "scaler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scaling method */,
  "scaler_name" TEXT /* Name of the scaling method (e.g., MinMaxScaler) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scaling method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the scaling method (e.g., range, with_mean, with_std) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scaler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rebalancing_methods" (
  "rebalance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rebalancing method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the rebalancing method (e.g., RandomUnderSampler) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the rebalancing method (e.g., ratio, sampling_strategy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rebalance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dimensionality_reduction_techniques" (
  "reduction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dimensionality reduction technique */,
  "reduction_name" TEXT /* Name of the technique (e.g., PCA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technique */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the technique (e.g., n_components, random_state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reduction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missing_data_handling" (
  "fill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each missing data handling method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., Zero) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the method (e.g., value, strategy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC score for the model */,
  "precision_n_scores" REAL /* Precision score for the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall score for the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score for the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy score for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exceptions" (
  "exception_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the exception entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration where the exception occurred */,
  "exception_message" TEXT /* Message describing the exception */,
  "exception_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exception occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exception_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exceptions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the history entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experiment entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., data science, engineering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the collaboration entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comment entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
